markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Plan a joint GrowthX x Webflow mini-conference on the future of the web, focusing on AEO/GEO and AI for marketing leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event format: \~50 person morning session at GrowthX office, followed by exclusive VIP dinner](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Target audience: CMOs, VPs of Marketing from hot startups and tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Content focus: Expert talks on AEO/GEO and AI impact on marketing, to be recorded and distributed](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Webflow team to build event website using Webflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Tentative date: November 10, 2025 (2 weeks before Thanksgiving)](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Event Format and Venue

  - [Morning session (\~3-4 hours) at GrowthX office, capacity \~35-50 people](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [GrowthX office preferred due to turnkey setup, recording capabilities, and cost-effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Exclusive VIP dinner planned for the evening (e.g., at Lazy Bear, capacity up to 45 people)](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Breakfast to be provided at the morning session](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Budget and Logistics

  - [Initial $100k estimate deemed too high; actual cost expected to be significantly lower](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Webflow leadership (Dave) approved budget allocation, exact amount TBD](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to split costs; final budget to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Valet parking service suggested to mitigate parking challenges at GrowthX office](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Content and Speakers

  - [Focus on establishing thought leadership in AEO/GEO and AI for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Both GrowthX and Webflow to contribute speakers and panel participants](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Content to be recorded and distributed post-event for wider reach](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Target Audience and Invitations

  - [Aiming for 30-50 high-level marketing executives (CMOs, VPs of Marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [GrowthX confident in attracting 30+ local SF executives from hot startups](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Both companies to compile invite lists and share for coordination](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)

### Website and Promotion

  - [Webflow team (Carly and Marissa) to build event website using Webflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
  - [Aim to have a simple landing page ready by Friday (Oct 10) for initial announcement](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Post-event amplification of recorded content to be discussed later](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize event date (tentatively Nov 10, 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [GrowthX to send office photos to Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2215.0)
  - [Marissa to confirm website development timeline with Carly](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Jason to circulate mock-up design for comments](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
  - [Both teams to start compiling invite lists](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Gloria to explore VIP dinner venue options and provide cost estimates](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Marissa to look into budget allocation on Webflow's side](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Jason to follow up with Marissa on website progress and budget](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
  - [Teams to collaboratively develop event agenda](https://fathom.video/share/RN3Mw8WsrqthqzZU5sanbLFn4gLfCaKU?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
